channel.title: OOIR Trends: Clinical Medicine (Medicine, General & Internal)
channel.description: Aktuelle Paper-Trends im Bereich Clinical Medicine (Medicine, General & Internal) von OOIR (mit Titel und Metadaten von Crossref)

item.title: Daraxonrasib or Chemotherapy in Previously Treated Metastatic Pancreatic Cancer
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Medicine, General & Internal Score: 3164 Autoren: Eileen M. O’Reilly, Zev A. Wainberg, Andrew E. Hendifar, Mitesh J. Borad, Filippo Pietrantonio, Shubham Pant, Pascal Hammel, Chiara Cremolini, Gulam A. Manji, Paul E. Oberstein, Ignacio Garrido-Laguna, Christoph Springfeld, Nilofer S. Azad, Makoto Ueno, Stephen Y. Chui, Ying Zhang, Hina Patel, Yeonju Lee, Zeena Salman, Brian M. Wolpin Journal: New England Journal of Medicine Veröffentlicht: 2026-05-31 DOI: 10.1056/nejmoa2605555 ISSN: 0028-4793 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-06-21

item.title: Updated trends in the global prevalence and burden of mental disorders, 1990–2023: a systematic analysis for the Global Burden of Disease Study 2023
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Medicine, General & Internal Score: 1124 Autoren: Damian F Santomauro, Paul Anthony Miller, Jamileh Shadid, Sarah Wulf Hanson, Anh Vo, Darius Jake Roy, Hailey Hagins, Ana M Mantilla Herrera, James G Scott, Holly E Erskine, John J McGrath, Hasan Aalruz, Hedayat Abbastabar, Nadin M.I. item.title: Phase 3 Results of Bepirovirsen Treatment for Chronic Hepatitis B Virus Infection
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Medicine, General & Internal Score: 1026 Autoren: Jinlin Hou, Seng-Gee Lim, Maria Buti, Man-Fung Yuen, Edward Gane, Pietro Lampertico, Norah Terrault, Huy Nguyen, Hyung Joon Yim, Qing Xie, Jianmei Lin, Yunqing Qiu, Wen-Juei Jeng, Jeong Heo, Cheng-Yuan Peng, Chien-Hung Chen, Wan-Long Chuang, Yao Xie, Maria Hlebowicz, Nevin Idriz, Rajiv Mehta, Kosh Agarwal, Monica M. item.title: Suicide Mortality Among Adolescents and Young Adults After Launch of a Suicide and Crisis Lifeline
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Medicine, General & Internal Score: 995 Autoren: Vishal R. Patel, Michael Liu, Anupam B. Jena Journal: JAMA Veröffentlicht: 2026-05-19 Abstract: This study uses data from the National Vital Statistics System to examine quarterly suicide mortality among individuals aged 15 to 34 years. DOI: 10.1001/jama.2026.5157 ISSN: 0098-7484 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-06-21

item.title: Mortality in US Immigration and Customs Enforcement Detention
item.description: Feld: Clinical Medicine Kategorie: Medicine, General & Internal Score: 852 Autoren: Sanjay Basu, Benjamin Q. Huynh, Mathew V. Kiang, Elizabeth T. Chin, Jason R. Andrews Journal: JAMA Veröffentlicht: 2026-05-12 Abstract: This study estimates annual mortality rates among individuals detained in US Immigration and Customs Enforcement facilities and summarizes age and cause of death patterns from 2004 through January 2026. DOI: 10.1001/jama.2026.3719 ISSN: 0098-7484 Tag der Erhebung (OOIR): 2026-06-21
